---
title: "Exploring Australian Frog Data from FrogID"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This project was developed by Kayla Mac For [INFO 526 - Data Analysis and Visualization](https://datavizaz.org/) at the University of Arizona, taught by Dr. Greg Chism. The team is comprised of the following team members.

-   Kayla Mac: Currently pursuing a Master's of Science in Data Science.
